page_metadata.biotools__summary: CANOPUS is a tool for predicting compound classes directly from MS/MS. Because it does not depend on any database, CANOPUS is suitable for the classification of unknowns.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CANOPUS is a tool for predicting compound classes directly from MS/MS. Because it does not depend on any database, CANOPUS is suitable for the classification of unknowns.
